text: All even numbers are integers. 2 + 2 = 4. Prove that 4 is even. Execute a plan to confirm the result using arithmetic.
All mammals are animals. All dogs are mammals. All animals have hearts. Prove dogs have hearts.
All numbers that are multiples of 2 are even. 6 is a multiple of 2 and 3. Prove 6 is even. Verify with code execution.
All primes greater than 2 are odd. 7 is prime. Prove 7 is odd.
If a number is divisible by 4 then it is even. 12 is divisible by 4. Prove 12 is even and execute verification.
